transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you entering the university writing contest this year?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. My English professor encouraged me to submit one of my essays.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man entering the writing contest?

questions.prompt: Why is the man entering the writing contest?

choices.text: His professor encouraged him to participate.
He has to complete a class assignment.
He wants to become an editor.

questions.explanation: He says his English professor encouraged him to submit an essay.
questions.evidence: My English professor encouraged me to submit one of my essays.
